title: Housing Related Coordinated Entry * Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Housing & Shelter > Housing Related Coordinated Entry * Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues Domestic Violence Issues Homeless Families Homeless Veterans Homeless Youth Human Trafficking Issues Pregnant Individuals Sexual Assault Issues Veterans Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF 211INFO 211INFO RESOURCE PARENT SUPPORT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers support, resource referral, and additional after-hours support for foster parents. Eligibility: Any foster parent with an ODHS Child Welfare case or in the Oregon Foster Care System Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email 211 Visit Website More Details No Mapping Information Available
